description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design. The facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in vertical and horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces with metal railings, enhancing outdoor living space. A garage is integrated into the ground floor, with a car parked in front, and the main entryway is recessed beneath the upper story. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or concrete, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on symmetry and openness.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and multiple balconies. The exterior is smooth and light-colored, featuring a garage and a recessed main entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, and large vertical windows with a car parked in front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, upper balconies with railings, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the expansive terrace area and the boxy, geometric structure with large windows.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view showing the garage door, additional entryway, and more of the terrace and balcony spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway beneath upper story, integrated garage, no porch or decorative columns, minimalist design
